heading: Lenders authorized to make loans; decrease or increase of liability under the guaranty
label: 1488 Lenders authorized to make loans; decrease or increase of liability under the guaranty
text: Loans guaranteed hereunder may be made by any lender satisfactory to the Secretary, except as provided in . The liability under the guaranty shall decrease or increase pro rata with any decrease or increase in the unpaid portion of the obligation.section 1486 of this title
